then.description: Package is the top-level structure of a Zarf package definition.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the Zarf package.

aggregateChecksum.description: Checksum of a checksums.txt file that contains checksums all the layers within the package.

architecture.description: The architecture this package was created on.

differential.description: Whether this package was created with differential components.

differentialPackageVersion.description: Version of a previously built package used as the basis for creating this differential package.

flavor.description: The flavor of Zarf used to build this package.

hostname.description: The machine name that created this package.

migrations.description: Any migrations that have been run on this package.

provenanceFiles.description: ProvenanceFiles lists files present in the package that are not included in checksums.txt. These are files added after checksum generation (e.g., signature files).

registryOverrides.description: Any registry domains that were overridden on package create when pulling images.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when this package was created.

user.description: The username who created this package.

version.description: The version of Zarf used to build this package.

versionRequirements.description: Requirements for specific Zarf versions needed to deploy this package.

items.description: VersionRequirement specifies a minimum Zarf version needed and the reason for the requirement.

reason.description: The reason this version is required.

version.description: The minimum version of Zarf required.

components.description: List of components to deploy in this package.

items.description: Component is the primary functional grouping of assets to deploy by Zarf.

actions.description: Custom commands to run at various stages of a package lifecycle.

onCreate.description: Actions to run during package creation.

before.description: Actions to run at the start of an operation.

items.description: ComponentAction represents a single action to run during a Zarf package operation.

cmd.description: The command to run. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action to do anything.

description.description: Description of the action to be displayed during package execution instead of the command.

dir.description: The working directory to run the command in (default is CWD).

enableValues.description: EnableValues enables go-template processing on the cmd field.

env.description: Additional environment variables to set for the command.

maxTotalSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the command (default 0, no timeout for cmd actions and 300, 5 minutes for wait actions).

retries.description: Retry the command if it fails up to a given number of times (default 0).

setValues.description: An array of values to set with the output of the command.

items.description: SetValue declares a value that can be set during a package deploy.

key.description: Key represents which value to assign to.

type.description: Type declares the kind of data being stored in the value.

shell.description: Indicates a preference for a shell for the provided cmd.

darwin.description: Darwin (macOS) shell preference.

linux.description: Linux shell preference.

windows.description: Windows shell preference.

silent.description: Hide the output of the command during package deployment (default false).

cluster.description: Wait for a condition to be met in the cluster before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

condition.description: The condition or jsonpath state to wait for; defaults to kstatus readiness checks.

kind.description: The kind of resource to wait for.

name.description: The name of the resource or selector to wait for.

namespace.description: The namespace of the resource to wait for.

network.description: Wait for a condition to be met on the network before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

code.description: The HTTP status code to wait for if using http or https.

charts.description: Helm charts to install during package deploy.

items.description: Chart defines a helm chart to be deployed.

git.description: The Git repository where the chart is stored.

path.description: The subdirectory containing the chart within a Git repo.

url.description: The URL of the Git repository where the Helm chart is stored.

helmRepository.description: The Helm repository where the chart is stored.

name.description: The name of a chart within a Helm repository.

url.description: The URL of the chart repository where the Helm chart is stored.

version.description: The version of the chart in the Helm repository.

local.description: The local path where the chart is stored.

path.description: The path to a local chart's folder or .tgz archive.

name.description: The name of the chart within Zarf; note that this must be unique and does not need to be the same as the name in the chart repository.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the chart to.

oci.description: The OCI registry where the chart is stored.

url.description: The URL of the OCI registry where the Helm chart is stored.

version.description: The version of the chart in the OCI registry.

releaseName.description: The name of the Helm release to create (defaults to the Zarf name of the chart).

serverSideApply.description: Controls whether Helm uses Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) when deploying this chart. Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

skipSchemaValidation.description: Skip validation of the chart's values against its JSON schema. Defaults to false.

skipWait.description: Whether to skip waiting for chart resources to be ready before continuing.

values.description: List of value sources mapped to their Helm override targets.

items.description: ChartValue maps a values source path to a Helm chart target path.

sourcePath.description: The source path for the value.

targetPath.description: The target path within the Helm chart values.

valuesFiles.description: List of local values file paths or remote URLs to include in the package; these will be merged together when deployed.

description.description: Message to include during package deploy describing the purpose of this component.

files.description: Files or folders to place on disk during package deployment.

items.description: File defines a file to deploy.

checksum.description: Optional checksum of the file in the format <algorithm>:<checksum> (e.g. sha256:abc123). Defaults to sha256 if no algorithm is specified.

destination.description: The absolute or relative path where the file or folder should be copied to during package deploy.

enableValues.description: EnableValues enables go-template processing on this file during deploy.

executable.description: Determines if the file should be made executable during package deploy.

extractPath.description: Local folder or file to be extracted from a 'source' archive.

source.description: Local folder or file path or remote URL to pull into the package.

symlinks.description: List of symlinks to create during package deploy.

imageArchives.description: List of tar archives of images to include in the package.

items.description: ImageArchive defines a tar archive of images to include in the package.

images.description: The list of images contained in the archive.

path.description: The path to the tar archive.

images.description: List of OCI images to include in the package.

items.description: Image defines an OCI image to include in the package.

name.description: The image reference.

source.description: The source to pull the image from. Defaults to "registry".

import.description: Import a component from another Zarf component config.

local.description: Local file path references to component config files to import.

items.description: ComponentImportLocal is a local file path reference to a component config.

path.description: The local file path to the component config.

remote.description: OCI URL references to remote component config files to import; pulled at create time.

items.description: ComponentImportRemote is a remote OCI URL reference to a component config.

url.description: The OCI URL of the remote component config.

manifests.description: Kubernetes manifests to be included in a generated Helm chart on package deploy.

items.description: Manifest defines raw manifests Zarf will deploy as a helm chart.

enableValues.description: EnableValues enables go-template processing on these manifests during deploy.

files.description: List of local K8s YAML files or remote URLs to deploy (in order).

allowAnyDirectory.description: Allow traversing directory above the current directory if needed for kustomization.

enablePlugins.description: Enable kustomize plugins when building manifests.

files.description: List of local kustomization paths or remote URLs to include in the package.

name.description: A name to give this collection of manifests; this will become the name of the dynamically-created helm chart.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the manifests to.

serverSideApply.description: Controls whether Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) is used during deploy. Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

skipWait.description: Whether to skip waiting for manifest resources to be ready before continuing.

name.description: The name of the component.

optional.description: Do not install this component unless explicitly requested. Defaults to false, meaning the component is required.

repositories.description: List of git repositories to include in the package.

service.description: The Zarf CLI service this component provides, such as the registry, injector, or agent.

target.description: Filter when this component is included in package creation or deployment.

architecture.description: Only include component for the given package architecture.

flavor.description: Only include this component when a matching '--flavor' is specified on 'zarf package create'.

os.description: Only deploy component to specified OS.

documentation.description: Documentation files included in the package.

kind.description: The kind of Zarf package.

annotations.description: Annotations are key-value pairs that can be used to store metadata about the package.

architecture.description: The target cluster architecture for this package.

description.description: Additional information about this Zarf package.

name.description: Name to identify this Zarf package.

preventNamespaceOverride.description: Prevent namespace overrides for this package.

version.description: Generic string set by a package author to track the package version.

values.description: Values imports Zarf values files for templating and overriding Helm values.

files.description: List of values file paths to include.

schema.description: Path to a JSON schema file for validating values.

then.description: ZarfPackage the top-level structure of a Zarf config file.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the Zarf package.

architecture.description: The architecture this package was created on.

differential.description: Whether this package was created with differential components.

differentialMissing.description: List of components that were not included in this package due to differential packaging.

differentialPackageVersion.description: Version of a previously built package used as the basis for creating this differential package.

flavor.description: The flavor of Zarf used to build this package.

migrations.description: Any migrations that have been run on this package.

provenanceFiles.description:
ProvenanceFiles lists files present in the package that are not included in checksums.txt.
These are files added after checksum generation (e.g., signature files).
This list is authenticated through the signed zarf.yaml.

registryOverrides.description: Any registry domains that were overridden on package create when pulling images.

terminal.description: The machine name that created this package.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when this package was created.

user.description: The username who created this package.

version.description: The version of Zarf used to build this package.

items.description: VersionRequirement specifies minimum version requirements for the package

reason.description: Explanation for why this version is required

version.description: The minimum version of Zarf required to use this package

components.description: List of components to deploy in this package.

items.description: ZarfComponent is the primary functional grouping of assets to deploy by Zarf.

actions.description: Custom commands to run at various stages of a package lifecycle.

onCreate.description: Actions to run during package creation.

after.description: Actions to run at the end of an operation.

items.description: ZarfComponentAction represents a single action to run during a zarf package operation.

cmd.description: The command to run. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action to do anything.

description.description: Description of the action to be displayed during package execution instead of the command.

dir.description: The working directory to run the command in (default is CWD).

env.description: Additional environment variables to set for the command.

maxRetries.description: Retry the command if it fails up to given number of times (default 0).

maxTotalSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the command (default to 0, no timeout for cmd actions and 300, 5 minutes for wait actions).

mute.description: Hide the output of the command during package deployment (default false).

setValues.description: (onDeploy/onRemove/cmd only) An array of variables to update with the output of the command. These variables will be available to all remaining actions and components in the package.

items.description: SetValue declares a value that can be set during a package deploy.

key.description: Key represents which value to assign to.

type.description:
Type declares the kind of data being stored in the value. JSON and YAML types ensure proper formatting when
inserting the value into the template. Defaults to SetValueString behavior when empty.

value.description: Value is the current value at the key.

setVariable.description: [Deprecated] (replaced by setVariables) (onDeploy/cmd only) The name of a variable to update with the output of the command. This variable will be available to all remaining actions and components in the package. This will be removed in Zarf v1.0.0.

setVariables.description: (onDeploy/cmd only) An array of variables to update with the output of the command. These variables will be available to all remaining actions and components in the package.

items.description: Variable represents a variable that has a value set programmatically

autoIndent.description: Whether to automatically indent the variable's value (if multiline) when templating. Based on the number of chars before the start of ###ZARF_VAR_.

name.description: The name to be used for the variable

pattern.description: An optional regex pattern that a variable value must match before a package deployment can continue.

sensitive.description: Whether to mark this variable as sensitive to not print it in the log

type.description: Changes the handling of a variable to load contents differently (i.e. from a file rather than as a raw variable - templated files should be kept below 1 MiB)

shell.description: (cmd only) Indicates a preference for a shell for the provided cmd to be executed in on supported operating systems.

darwin.description: (default 'sh') Indicates a preference for the shell to use on macOS systems

linux.description: (default 'sh') Indicates a preference for the shell to use on Linux systems

windows.description: (default 'powershell') Indicates a preference for the shell to use on Windows systems (note that choosing 'cmd' will turn off migrations like touch -> New-Item)

template.description: Disable go-template processing on the cmd field. This is useful when the cmd contains go-templates that should be passed to another system.

wait.description: Wait for a condition to be met before continuing. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action. See the 'zarf tools wait-for' command for more info.

cluster.description: Wait for a condition to be met in the cluster before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

condition.description: The condition or jsonpath state to wait for; defaults to exist, a special condition that will wait for the resource to exist.

kind.description: The kind of resource to wait for.

name.description: The name of the resource or selector to wait for.

namespace.description: The namespace of the resource to wait for.

network.description: Wait for a condition to be met on the network before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

code.description: The HTTP status code to wait for if using http or https.

before.description: Actions to run at the start of an operation.

items.description: ZarfComponentAction represents a single action to run during a zarf package operation.

cmd.description: The command to run. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action to do anything.

description.description: Description of the action to be displayed during package execution instead of the command.

dir.description: The working directory to run the command in (default is CWD).

env.description: Additional environment variables to set for the command.

maxRetries.description: Retry the command if it fails up to given number of times (default 0).

maxTotalSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the command (default to 0, no timeout for cmd actions and 300, 5 minutes for wait actions).

mute.description: Hide the output of the command during package deployment (default false).

setValues.description: (onDeploy/onRemove/cmd only) An array of variables to update with the output of the command. These variables will be available to all remaining actions and components in the package.

items.description: SetValue declares a value that can be set during a package deploy.

key.description: Key represents which value to assign to.

type.description:
Type declares the kind of data being stored in the value. JSON and YAML types ensure proper formatting when
inserting the value into the template. Defaults to SetValueString behavior when empty.

value.description: Value is the current value at the key.

charts.description: Helm charts to install during package deploy.

items.description: ZarfChart defines a helm chart to be deployed.

gitPath.description: (git repo only) The sub directory to the chart within a git repo.

localPath.description: The path to a local chart's folder or .tgz archive.

name.description: The name of the chart within Zarf; note that this must be unique and does not need to be the same as the name in the chart repo.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the chart to.

noWait.description: Whether to not wait for chart resources to be ready before continuing.

releaseName.description: The name of the Helm release to create (defaults to the Zarf name of the chart).

repoName.description: The name of a chart within a Helm repository (defaults to the Zarf name of the chart).

schemaValidation.description: Whether or not to validate the values.yaml schema, defaults to true. Necessary in the air-gap when the JSON Schema references resources on the internet.

serverSideApply.description:
Controls whether Helm uses Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) when deploying this chart.
  - "true":  always use SSA
  - "false": always use CSA
  - "auto":  use SSA for fresh installs; for upgrades, match whichever strategy
             was used when the chart was first installed
Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

url.description: The URL of the OCI registry, chart repository, or git repo where the helm chart is stored.
examples: git repo: https://github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo (note the '@' syntax for 'repos' is supported here too)

values.description: [alpha] List of values sources to their Helm override target

items.description: ZarfChartValue maps a Zarf Value key to a Helm Value.

sourcePath.description: Path to Zarf values key. A single dot (.) represents the root.

targetPath.description: Path to chart values key. A single dot (.) represents the root.

valuesFiles.description: List of local values file paths or remote URLs to include in the package; these will be merged together when deployed.

variables.description: [alpha] List of variables to set in the Helm chart.

items.description: ZarfChartVariable represents a variable that can be set for a Helm chart overrides.

description.description: A brief description of what the variable controls.

name.description: The name of the variable.

path.description: The path within the Helm chart values where this variable applies.

version.description: The version of the chart to deploy; for git-based charts this is also the tag of the git repo by default (when not using the '@' syntax for 'repos').

dataInjections.description: [Deprecated] Datasets to inject into a container in the target cluster.

items.description: ZarfDataInjection is a data-injection definition.

compress.description: Compress the data before transmitting using gzip. Note: this requires support for tar/gzip locally and in the target image.

source.description: Either a path to a local folder/file or a remote URL of a file to inject into the given target pod + container.

target.description: The target pod + container to inject the data into.

container.description: The container name to target for data injection.

namespace.description: The namespace to target for data injection.

path.description: The path within the container to copy the data into.

selector.description: The K8s selector to target for data injection.

default.description: Determines the default Y/N state for installing this component on package deploy.

description.description: Message to include during package deploy describing the purpose of this component.

files.description: Files or folders to place on disk during package deployment.

items.description: ZarfFile defines a file to deploy.

executable.description: (files only) Determines if the file should be made executable during package deploy.

extractPath.description: Local folder or file to be extracted from a 'source' archive.

shasum.description: (files only) Optional SHA256 checksum of the file.

source.description: Local folder or file path or remote URL to pull into the package.

symlinks.description: List of symlinks to create during package deploy.

target.description: The absolute or relative path where the file or folder should be copied to during package deploy.

template.description:
[alpha]
Template enables go-templates inside manifests. This is useful for parameterizing fields that the value will be
known at deploy-time. See documentation for Zarf Values for how to set these values.

group.description: [Deprecated] Create a user selector field based on all components in the same group. This will be removed in Zarf v1.0.0. Consider using 'only.flavor' instead.

healthChecks.description: List of resources to health check after deployment

items.description: NamespacedObjectKindReference is a reference to a specific resource in a namespace using its kind and API version.

kind.description: Kind of the resource

name.description: Name of the resource

namespace.description: Namespace of the resource

imageArchives.description: List of Tar files of images to bring into the package.

items.description: ImageArchive points to an archived file containing an OCI layout

images.description: Images within the OCI layout to be brought into the package

path.description: Path to file containing an OCI-layout

images.description: List of OCI images to include in the package.

import.description: Import a component from another Zarf package.

name.description: The name of the component to import from the referenced zarf.yaml.

path.description: The path to the directory containing the zarf.yaml to import.

url.description: [beta] The URL to a Zarf package to import via OCI.

manifests.description: Kubernetes manifests to be included in a generated Helm chart on package deploy.

items.description: ZarfManifest defines raw manifests Zarf will deploy as a helm chart.

enableKustomizePlugins.description: Enable kustomize plugins during kustomize builds.

files.description: List of local K8s YAML files or remote URLs to deploy (in order).

kustomizations.description: List of local kustomization paths or remote URLs to include in the package.

kustomizeAllowAnyDirectory.description: Allow traversing directory above the current directory if needed for kustomization.

name.description: A name to give this collection of manifests; this will become the name of the dynamically-created helm chart.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the manifests to.

noWait.description: Whether to not wait for manifest resources to be ready before continuing.

serverSideApply.description:
Controls whether Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) is used during deploy.
  - "true":  always use SSA
  - "false": always use CSA
  - "auto":  use SSA for fresh installs; for upgrades, match whichever strategy
             was used when the chart was first installed
Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

template.description:
[alpha]
Template enables go-templates inside manifests. This is useful for parameterizing fields that the value will be
known at deploy-time. See documentation for Zarf Values for how to set these values.

name.description: The name of the component.

only.description: Filter when this component is included in package creation or deployment.

cluster.description: Only deploy component to specified clusters.

architecture.description: Only create and deploy to clusters of the given architecture.

distros.description: A list of kubernetes distros this package works with (Reserved for future use).

flavor.description: Only include this component when a matching '--flavor' is specified on 'zarf package create'.

localOS.description: Only deploy component to specified OS.

repos.description: List of git repos to include in the package.

required.description: Do not prompt user to install this component.

scripts.description: [Deprecated] (replaced by actions) Custom commands to run before or after package deployment. This will be removed in Zarf v1.0.0.

after.description: Scripts to run after the component successfully deploys.

before.description: Scripts to run before the component is deployed.

prepare.description: Scripts to run before the component is added during package create.

retry.description: Retry the script if it fails.

showOutput.description: Show the output of the script during package deployment.

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the script.

constants.description: Constant template values applied on deploy for K8s resources.

items.description: Constant are constants that can be used to dynamically template K8s resources or run in actions.

autoIndent.description: Whether to automatically indent the variable's value (if multiline) when templating. Based on the number of chars before the start of ###ZARF_CONST_.

description.description: A description of the constant to explain its purpose on package create or deploy confirmation prompts

name.description: The name to be used for the constant

pattern.description: An optional regex pattern that a constant value must match before a package can be created.

value.description: The value to set for the constant during deploy

documentation.description: Documentation files to be added to the package

kind.description: The kind of Zarf package.

aggregateChecksum.description: Checksum of a checksums.txt file that contains checksums all the layers within the package.

allowNamespaceOverride.description: AllowNamespaceOverride controls whether a package's namespace may be overridden.

annotations.description:
Annotations contains arbitrary metadata about the package.
Users are encouraged to follow OCI image-spec https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/main/annotations.md

architecture.description: The target cluster architecture for this package.

authors.description: Comma-separated list of package authors (including contact info).

description.description: Additional information about this package.

documentation.description: Link to package documentation when online.

image.description: An image URL to embed in this package (Reserved for future use in Zarf UI).

name.description: Name to identify this Zarf package.

source.description: Link to package source code when online.

url.description: Link to package information when online.

vendor.description: Name of the distributing entity, organization or individual.

version.description: Generic string set by a package author to track the package version (Note: ZarfInitConfigs will always be versioned to the CLIVersion they were created with).

yolo.description: Yaml OnLy Online (YOLO): True enables deploying a Zarf package without first running zarf init against the cluster. This is ideal for connected environments where you want to use existing VCS and container registries.

values.description: Values imports Zarf values files for templating and overriding Helm values.

files.description: Files declares the relative filepath of Values files.

schema.description: Schema declares a path to a .schema.json file that validates the contents of Files.

variables.description: Variable template values applied on deploy for K8s resources.

items.description: InteractiveVariable is a variable that can be used to prompt a user for more information

autoIndent.description: Whether to automatically indent the variable's value (if multiline) when templating. Based on the number of chars before the start of ###ZARF_VAR_.

default.description: The default value to use for the variable

description.description: A description of the variable to be used when prompting the user a value

name.description: The name to be used for the variable

pattern.description: An optional regex pattern that a variable value must match before a package deployment can continue.

prompt.description: Whether to prompt the user for input for this variable

sensitive.description: Whether to mark this variable as sensitive to not print it in the log
